privileged_info_summary: Task uses NCH DreamPlan software (real commercial application) with its built-in Contemporary House sample project. Output consists of three JPEG image files to be created by the agent: staged_living_room.jpg, staged_dining_room.jpg, and staged_bedroom.jpg, each saved to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\. All images must be created after task start timestamp and exceed 30,000 bytes. Task success requires exporting at least 2 of 3 images with content for a passing score. Result metadata is written to C:\Users\Docker\complete_home_staging_result.json. Data is not synthetic—it relies on real software and real sample project files.
